directional-vibrotactile-takeover-reques.title: Directional Vibrotactile Takeover Requests on a Wrist-Worn Device
directional-vibrotactile-takeover-reques.summary_html: Examines how age, vibration pattern type, and urgency affect directional vibrotactile takeover requests delivered through a wrist-worn device in automated driving.
directional-vibrotactile-takeover-reques.visual_alt: Visual preview for directional vibrotactile takeover requests

vibration-patterns-that-persuade-a-natio.title: Vibration Patterns That Persuade
vibration-patterns-that-persuade-a-natio.summary_html: A national survey of driver preferences for wrist-worn vibrotactile displays in automated vehicle takeover contexts.
vibration-patterns-that-persuade-a-natio.visual_alt: Visual preview for vibration preference survey results

shared-control-in-micro-mobility-effects.title: Shared Control in Micro-Mobility
shared-control-in-micro-mobility-effects.authors_html: Wei-Hsiang Lo, J. Lee, C. Roberts, M. Dong, K. Martinez, E.-E. Etu, S. Mehrotra, K. Akash, K. Salubre, T. Misu, Gaojian Huang
shared-control-in-micro-mobility-effects.summary_html: Studies how rider skill and automation levels affect subjective well-being in e-scooter use, contributing to human-AI collaboration for mobility.
shared-control-in-micro-mobility-effects.visual_alt: Visual preview for shared control in micro-mobility

the-impact-of-mental-states-scenarios-an.title: The Impact of Mental States, Scenarios, and Modalities on Informative Takeover Requests in Automated Driving
the-impact-of-mental-states-scenarios-an.authors_html: Wei-Hsiang Lo, A. Chu, Y. Luo, E.-E. Etu, N. Attar, G. Liu, Gaojian Huang
the-impact-of-mental-states-scenarios-an.summary_html: Studies how mental states, scenario context, and modality shape informative takeover requests in automated driving.

a-multi-modal-human-ai-collaboration-fra.title: A Multi-Modal Human-AI Collaboration Framework for E-Scooters
a-multi-modal-human-ai-collaboration-fra.authors_html: Wei-Hsiang Lo, Y. Wang, P. Wintersberger, Gaojian Huang
a-multi-modal-human-ai-collaboration-fra.summary_html: Evaluates AI roles and user preference in a multi-modal human-AI collaboration framework for e-scooters.

toward-ai-standardization-a-triadic-huma.title: Toward AI Standardization: A Triadic Human-AI Collaboration Framework for Multi-Level Autonomous Mobility
toward-ai-standardization-a-triadic-huma.authors_html: Gaojian Huang, Wei-Hsiang Lo, G. Liu, Y. Luo, Y. Jin
toward-ai-standardization-a-triadic-huma.summary_html: Frames multi-level autonomous mobility through a triadic human-AI collaboration model.

comparing-static-and-dynamic-vibration-c.title: Comparing Static and Dynamic Vibration Cues in Wristband Haptic Feedback
comparing-static-and-dynamic-vibration-c.summary_html: Compares static and dynamic wristband vibration cues for enhanced driver response in automated vehicles.

a-survey-on-perceptions-of-smartwatch-ha.title: A Survey on Perceptions of Smartwatch Haptic Feedback for Enhancing Automated Vehicle Takeover Decisions
a-survey-on-perceptions-of-smartwatch-ha.summary_html: Examines perceptions of smartwatch haptic feedback for automated vehicle takeover decision support.

assessing-meaningful-visual-and-tactile-.title: Assessing Meaningful Visual and Tactile Feedback for Effective Automated Vehicle Takeover
assessing-meaningful-visual-and-tactile-.summary_html: Assesses meaningful visual and tactile feedback for hearing and non-hearing drivers in automated vehicle takeover.

multimodal-feedback-for-effective-takeov.title: Multimodal Feedback for Effective Takeover in Automated Vehicles for Hearing Impairment
multimodal-feedback-for-effective-takeov.summary_html: Explores multimodal feedback for hearing and non-hearing drivers, recognized with the Auto UI Best Video Award.

the-impact-of-meaningful-vibrotactile-di.title: The Impact of Meaningful Vibrotactile Displays on User Preferences Across Age Groups in Automated Driving
the-impact-of-meaningful-vibrotactile-di.summary_html: Studies how meaningful vibrotactile displays shape user preferences across age groups in automated driving.

beyond-levels-of-driving-automation-a-tr.title: Beyond Levels of Driving Automation: A Triadic Framework of Human-AI Collaboration in On-Road Mobility
beyond-levels-of-driving-automation-a-tr.summary_html: Develops a triadic framework for human-AI collaboration beyond traditional driving automation levels.

mental-states-machine-enhancing-driver-e.title: Mental States & Machine: Enhancing Driver Engagement in Automated Vehicles for Safer Transitions
mental-states-machine-enhancing-driver-e.authors_html: Wei-Hsiang Lo, A. Chu, Y. Luo, E.-E. Etu, N. Attar, Gaojian Huang
mental-states-machine-enhancing-driver-e.summary_html: Technical report on driver engagement, mental states, and safer automated vehicle transitions.

insights-for-the-future-of-car-rental-an.authors_html: P. Meda, A. V. Contreras, Wei-Hsiang Lo, Gaojian Huang, Y. Luo
